modalSubtitle: Ku xiro Stripe ama Paystack si aad u aqbasho lacag-bixinta
errorEmailMissing: Iimaylka akoonka lama helin. Fadlan cusboonaysii xogtaada.
errorRequiredFields: Fadlan buuxi dhammaan meelaha loo baahan yahay
errorBankFields: Fadlan xulo bangi oo geli lambarka xisaabtaada
successPaystack: Dejinta lacag-bixinta way dhammaatay! M-Pesa & kaadhadhka hadda waa la furay.
bannerStripe: ✓ Stripe Connect · KYC ayaa loo baahan yahay · Kharash: ~4.9%
bannerWaafipay: ✓ EVC Plus, WAAFI, Zaad & Sahal lacagta mobiilka · Uma baahnid xog bangi — AskBiz ayaa kula dejin doonta
mpesaPhoneHint: Lambarkani wuxuu heli doonaa dhammaystirka waxaana loo isticmaali doonaa in lagu weydiisto lacag-bixinta M-Pesa ee macaamiisha POS-ka
hintStripe: 1. Buuxi xogta → 2. U sii wad Stripe → 3. Dhammee KYC → 4. Aqbal lacag-bixinta
hintPaystackMpesa: 1. Geli xogta ganacsiga → 2. Ku xiro lambarka M-Pesa → 3. Keeshiyayaashu waxay weydiin karaan lacag-bixinta M-Pesa ee POS-ka
hintPaystackBank: 1. Geli xogta ganacsiga → 2. Xulo bangi & xisaab → 3. Kaadhadhku isla markiiba way furmaan
hintWaafipay: 1. Geli xogta ganacsiga → 2. Taageerada AskBiz way kuu dejisaa WaafiPay → 3. Keeshiyayaashu waxay weydiin karaan lacag-bixinta EVC Plus/WAAFI/Zaad/Sahal ee POS-ka
hintDefault: Xulo dal si aad u aragto habka dejinta gobolkaaga
fixSplitsSuccess: ✅ Qeybinta waa la hagaajiyay! Kharashka plat-foomka hadda waa firfircoon dhammaan lacag-bixinta.
fixSplitsErrorNetwork: ⚠ Khalad shabakad — fadlan mar kale isku day.
waafipayPendingSubtitle: AskBiz ayaa kula soo xiriiri doonta si loo dhammeeyo dejinta WaafiPay
successWaafipay: Codsigii waa la helay! AskBiz ayaa kula soo xiriiri doonta si loo dhammeeyo dejinta WaafiPay — hadda wax kale ma loo baahna.
